estimand_note: spot's production estimand is a per-program base-delta projection over a reusable-arm system; the paper controls are per-cytokine DESeq2 knockdown effects. These are DIFFERENT estimands. This lane checks the paper's reported SIGN at a significant condition only; it is descriptive concordance, not a replication claim.

preprint.title: Genome-scale perturb-seq in primary human CD4+ T cells maps context-specific regulators of T cell programs and human immune traits
preprint.authors: Zhu R., Dann E. et al.

sign_convention.readout: log_fc layer value at (regulator perturbation row {ENSG}_{condition}, cytokine gene column)
sign_convention.definition: log_fc = cytokine RNA log2 fold-change on regulator KNOCKDOWN (CRISPRi) vs non-targeting control
sign_convention.positive_regulator: knockdown log2FC < 0 (KD lowers the cytokine; regulator PROMOTES it) => expected sign NEGATIVE
sign_convention.negative_regulator: knockdown log2FC > 0 (KD raises the cytokine; regulator REPRESSES it) => expected sign POSITIVE
sign_convention.source_quote: negative regulators (knockdown log2FC > 0) were detected predominantly in the Rest condition ... positive regulators (knockdown log2FC < 0) were more readily identified following re-stimulation

cytokine_panel_note: the cytokines NAMED in the Results (p8-9); the authors' full 30-cytokine panel derives from their code (metadata/immune_effector_genes.csv, Category=='Cytokine') and is authoritative but not restated in the Results prose. The broad-effect count uses this paper-named panel.

provenance_diagnostics_policy.label: authors_reported_upstream
provenance_diagnostics_policy.confined_to: the per-observation provenance_diagnostics block of the diagnostic report ONLY; never a production output, never a rank/gate input

tissue_organ_axis.rationale: This is a genome-scale CRISPRi perturb-seq of primary human CD4+ T cells (a blood/immune cell in-vitro assay) across 4 donors x {Rest, Stim8hr, Stim48hr} x perturbation. It has donor, condition, and perturbation axes ONLY. There is NO tissue/organ axis. The HPA tissue-specificity annotation (Suppl. Figure 13) is EXTERNAL Human Protein Atlas annotation of regulator gene clusters, not a Marson tissue measurement, and is out of scope for this cytokine-sign lane.

source.quote: MEN1, a component of the MLL1/2 complex known to repress IL10 expression [30], was among the top negative regulators of IL10
negative regulation of IL10 by members of the SAGA complex (SGF29, ATXN7L3, USP22)
ELOB, a regulatory subunit of the Elongin complex
perturb-seq identified oxidoreductase CYB5R4 as a positive regulator of IL21
regulators of calcium homeostasis (ATP2A2, ORAI1) ... as negative regulators of IL21
the Elongator complex (ELP2, ELP3) as negative regulators of IL21
NFKB2 ... as divergent regulators - acting as positive regulators for IL10 but negative regulators for IL21
the lysine-specific demethylase KDM1A as divergent regulators - acting as positive regulators for IL10 but negative regulators for IL21
positive regulators (knockdown log2FC < 0) were more readily identified following re-stimulation (e.g., CD3 and LCP2 for IL2 ...)
positive regulators (knockdown log2FC < 0) were more readily identified following re-stimulation (e.g., ... GATA3 for IL13)

controls.expected: control a LARGE set of cytokines (broad, stimulation-specific effects incl. TNF and IL-16)

source.quote: regulators that controlled a large set of cytokines, including expected TCR signaling components and subunits of the ubiquitous transcriptional coactivator complexes Mediator (MED12, MED24) and SAGA (TAF6L, TADA1, TADA2B, SUPT20H, USP22) ... caused stimulation-specific effects on multiple cytokines, including TNF and IL-16
